name: openEuler iSulad SIG
description: The iSulad team is responsible for lightweight container runtime(iSulad) function development and maintenance of the openEuler community.

name: openEuler iSulad SIG Repository List
description: openEuler iSulad SIG maintains 20 repositories in the Cloud Computing and Containers domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler iSulad SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The iSulad team is responsible for lightweight container runtime(iSulad) function development and maintenance of the openEuler community.. The SIG has 8 core members and maintains 20 repositories in the Cloud Computing and Containers domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler iSulad SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler iSulad SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at isulad@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler iSulad SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler iSulad SIG maintains 20 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/iSulad.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler iSulad SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler iSulad SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: Haomin Cai, Hao Liu, Jingxiao Lu. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
